checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 1 flow with 5 nodes, 4 edges, properly connected start-to-end

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Schedule trigger has valid cron (0 9 * * 1), manual trigger present

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: No connectors requiring user config — adoption_questions not needed

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: research_topic has default 'News in AI this week'

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 59w, instructions 340w+, tool guidance present, 2 examples, error handling comprehensive

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 59 words (>50), instructions well over 200 words with numbered steps, tool guidance for file_read/file_write, 2 detailed examples with output formats, comprehensive error handling section.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: file_read and file_write referenced in prompt match suggested_tools. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Weekly Monday 9AM schedule aligns perfectly with 'weekly research briefing' workflow. Manual trigger for on-demand use.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: No external connectors needed. Uses built-in file system and messaging. Service flow correctly reflects this.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Describes longitudinal tracking via research_index.json and trend detection across sessions. Good memory design but relies on file storage rather than agent_memory protocol.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Covers corrupted index, write failures, missing history, narrow topics, and speculation vs confirmed findings. Good but no rate limit or timeout handling needed since no external APIs.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: Single flow covers the complete research-to-delivery pipeline. All steps in the prompt map to flow nodes.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Clear outcome: weekly AI intelligence briefing with trend tracking. Value is clear for teams wanting automated research synthesis.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Fully self-contained with built-in tools only. No external API dependencies. Highest feasibility possible.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Adds reasoning-based research synthesis and longitudinal tracking beyond what a simple cron job could do. However, without web access, research depth is limited to LLM knowledge.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: research_topic is genuinely needed to customize the research focus. No filler variables.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Can adopt with zero changes — default topic 'News in AI this week' produces a working persona immediately. Presets provide additional options.
